$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the index<->label map (plan §5.4). Shared verbatim by training and the extension: export copies this file next to icon-classifier.onnx (destined for public/models/labels.json). `labels[i].index` is the model's output column i. `synonyms` are alternate source-icon names that collapse to this canonical concept; taxonomy.py derives the reverse name->canonical map from them. Keep ordered by index, contiguous from 0.

unknown.label: unknown
unknown.$comment: Open decision (plan §5.11). Default: `unknown` is NOT a trained class; out-of-taxonomy icons are handled by abstaining below `default_threshold` (tuned later from the risk-coverage curve). Flip explicit_class=true to also train it as a real class — then add it to `labels` and regenerate.
